Uses of Enum Class
com.nib.commons.io.EncodingType

Packages that use EncodingType
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.

  • Uses of EncodingType in com.nib.commons.io

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected EncodingType
    AbstractFile.dataEncoding
    Represents the encoding type used for data storage within the file.
    protected EncodingType
    AbstractFile.recordEncoding
    Specifies the encoding type of the file's records.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractFile
    AbstractFile.encoding(EncodingType encoding)
    Sets the encoding type for the file and returns the current instance.
    SequentialFile
    SequentialFile.encoding(EncodingType encoding)
    Sets the encoding type for the file.

    AbstractFile.recordIs(AbstractNField record, EncodingType encoding)
    Assigns a record to the file using the specified field and encoding.
    AbstractFile

    Assigns a record to the file using the specified field, length and encoding.
    SequentialFile
